title: vigna mungo var. sublobata
intro: Vigna mungo var. sublobata, also known as the green gram or moong bean, is a type of climbing legume that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vigna mungo var. sublobata include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable asset in maintaining overall health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
